spotlight_1.name: Antonacci Dual Momentum Sector Rotation
spotlight_1.thesis_one_liner: Antonacci Dual Momentum Sector Rotation tests whether systematic price rotation can capture persistent sector momentum better than passive market exposure.
spotlight_1.teaser_hook: Academically validated signal with live trading receipts

spotlight_2.name: Mortgage Rate Housing Proxy
spotlight_2.thesis_one_liner: Mortgage Rate Housing Proxy tests whether source data can reveal consumer stress or demand rotation before it shows up in sector performance.
spotlight_2.teaser_hook: Alternative data experiment tracked live in public
